embeds.title: Dark Patterns: Are Your Games Playing You?
embeds.description:
Dark Patterns are everywhere in modern games, from login streaks to time-gated events and manipulative monetisation. In this video, I explain how these systems work, why they’re so effective, and how they impact both players and the industry.

References:
https://www.darkpattern.games
https://www.ga
